slides.text:
Emotional regulation is noticing what you're feeling,
understanding why, and choosing how to respond.
Recognize your emotions. What am I feeling right now? Name the emotion.

Allow your feelings. It's okay to feel this way.
Emotions are information, not instructions.
I am not my emotion. I am a person experiencing an emotion.
Take a time gap. Wait 90 seconds when triggered.
If emotions feel overwhelming, talk to a professional.
